✅ Save layout: Complete localStorage → Python → PostgreSQL flow implemented
✅ Map centering: #mapa-area has margin: 0 auto within 720px max-width, centered in grey wrapper
✅ Edit/Normal modes: CSS class toggle (draggable/clickable) + event handlers work correctly
